title: senecio acanthifolius
intro: Senecio acanthifolius, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Senecio acanthifolius include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed orally.
